title: Can we have 2 or more condition automations
excerpt: Love the automations.  But there are many times when I need 2 criteria to be filled before one is triggered.  Could you make automations that can be more complex in the status requirements?  eg. Such that when status =X …

posts.author: johnpauldaniel (John Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Love the automations. But there are many times when I need 2 criteria to be filled before one is triggered. Could you make automations that can be more complex in the status requirements? eg. Such that when status =X and status 1 - Y then send an email, or write a note, or schedule a call.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would that be different than using an if statement?

image1160×587 32.7 KB

posts.author: angela852black (Angela Black)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Yes, you can create automations with multiple conditions like:
“If Status = X AND Status 1 = Y, then trigger action.”

Best Regard,
Angela
